name: Tomato-And-Onion Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Wash tomatoes and cut off stem ends. Cut into 1/3-inch lengthwise slices.
3. Heat oil in a non-stick saute pan and saute onions over medium-high heat for about 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic, white wine, and rosemary; reduce heat to medium. Cover and cook until liquid is mostly absorbed (about 10 minutes).
5. Stir in olive puree. Spread onion-olive mixture over pizza crusts.
6. Place tomato slices on top and brush with remaining olive oil.
7. Sprinkle with oregano.
8. Bake for desired time. Makes 2 pizzas.
